# GSC 404 Fixes — 2026-05-08

**Generated by:** Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) during a counter.ink session  
**Context:** Google Search Console reported 57 Not Found (404) errors. Most were fixed
with aliases and 404-page redirect logic. The posts below are genuinely missing from
the repo — never committed — and need to be written/recovered and added to
`content/blg/new/`.

---

## Posts to rebuild or create

Each file needs an `aliases:` entry with the old root-level slug so the redirect
currently pointing to `/recent` upgrades to the actual post. Use this frontmatter
template:

```yaml
---
yaml_begin: true
title: [title]
description:
extract:
created: YYYY-MM-DD
updated: YYYY-MM-DD
author: tb
images: false
order:
enableToc: false
permalink:
aliases:
  - YYYY-MM-DD-the-old-slug
publish: true
tags:
status:
RSS: true
yaml_end: true
---
```

Once a file is restored and has its alias, remove the corresponding entry from
`content/recent.md`'s `aliases:` list.

---

## Status of other GSC issues (as of 2026-05-08)

- **57 × Not found (404):** handled — aliases added, 404-page auto-redirect deployed
- **5 × Excluded by noindex:** correct behavior (alias redirect shims)
- **1 × Page with redirect:** correct behavior (index → /recent)
- **32 × JSON-LD parse errors:** fixed in `quartz/components/Head.tsx` (dangerouslySetInnerHTML)
- **Group 5 dead tags + Group 6 garbage URLs:** require manual GSC URL removal requests
